rationale: In the citing paper, Mende et al. (2019) appears only in a grouped citation in the General Discussion to illustrate broader transformational technologies (e.g., AI/automation) affecting marketing and consumers. The citation is not used to build the paper's hypotheses, mechanism, measures, or empirical design about privacy notices, trust, and purchase interest. There is no distinct discussion of the service-robot findings or any direct conceptual dependence on that specific study.
